name: spin-wheel
title: Spin Wheel
description: Mobile-first welcome-deal spin wheel. Pure CSS conic-gradient wheel with 8 peach-gradient segments, absolute-positioned percentage labels using trigonometry, diamond pointer, dark cocoa CTA button, and guaranteed fallback discount code card.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
